name: Warhammer 40k public
description:
(THIS BOT WAS MADE WHEN I FIRST STARTED MAKING CHATBOTS. I MADE A REMASTERED VERSION WITH A LORE BOOK THAT MIGHT WORK BETTER)

https://janitorai.com/characters/f14a8cf2-a0fc-4690-85be-ee3fc65f1d6e_character-warhammer-40-k-rpg

I’ve also made a reunification wars bot if you want to play during that time period.

Despite the high token count the bot works.

I had to cram as much information about the setting and the imperium of man in there as possible the narrator will vaguely know about the tau, eldar, necrons and orks but it has no information about the Tyranids or the leagues.

This character is an RPG and since it’s set in 40K I used the dead dove tag I didn’t put anything too explicit into the scenario description but it is there just in case.
creator: Sir_Vulpes
